name: Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender.
2. Blend until smooth, adding the first 1/3 cup of olive oil.
3. Continue blending and add another 1/3 cup of olive oil.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
This is an exceptionally thick dressing that will require a wooden spoon to scoop out of the blender. It is highly regarded as one of the best recipes available.
